purpose: Mandatory pre-archive validation report. No file moves to governance/archive/ without first appearing in this report with check=PASS.
validation_procedure: 1. For each candidate file: grep the entire active repository tree (excluding governance/archive/) for any reference to its path or filename.
2. Check candidate path is NOT present in runtime_dependency_manifest.json under any list.
3. Check candidate path is NOT referenced as target_workflow_id or receipt path in ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
4. If candidate is a historical protocol document: check protocol_supersession_index.json entry has archive_allowed=true.
5. Record result per candidate: PASS (safe to move) or FAIL (live reference found, do not move, list the referencing file).

candidates_this_pass.grep_result: no active references found outside historical receipts
NOT PERFORMED — requires live repo grep, not available in this session
candidates_this_pass.manifest_check: absent from runtime_dependency_manifest.json (document itself; its CODE COMPONENTS are present and active)
candidates_this_pass.supersession_check: archive_allowed=false (protocol_supersession_index.json) — BLOCKED pending RV-1 normative_fragment_migration_check completion
candidates_this_pass.fail_reason: supersession_check blocks regardless of other checks

candidates_this_pass.grep_result: NOT PERFORMED — requires live repo grep, not available in this session
candidates_this_pass.supersession_check: not a protocol document, supersession check not applicable
candidates_this_pass.result: PENDING — grep step required before PASS can be issued
candidates_this_pass.fail_reason: Procedure step 1 (live grep) not executed in this session; cannot claim PASS without it. This is itself the dry-run gate working as designed: it blocks premature archival.

session_limitation_note: This report was prepared by an external auditor without bash/grep access to the live repository working tree (read access via GitHub API only, file-by-file). Step 1 (full-tree grep) requires a runner with repository checkout. The BEM-010 roadmap assigns this as task ARC-1 to Curator-Executor, who has checkout access in CI.
archival_decision_rule: Only candidates with result=PASS in this report may be moved. PENDING and FAIL candidates remain in active workspace until re-validated.
